CustomField.formula: CASE(Auto_Warranty_Status__c, 'In Warranty', IMAGE('/resource/Auto_Warranty_Icons/inWarranty.png?', 'Yes',30,30), 'Out of Warranty', IMAGE('/resource/Auto_Warranty_Icons/expired.png?', 'No',30,30), 'Approaching End of Warranty', IMAGE('/resource/Auto_Warranty_Icons/approachingEnd.png?', 'Warranty Ending',30,30), IMAGE('/resource/Auto_Warranty_Icons/unknownWarranty.png?', 'Warranty Unknown',30,30) )
CustomField.label: Warranty Indicator
